title: Parallax resolution queue (structured spec-gap items)
description: The authoritative, machine-readable queue of confirmed spec-gap resolution items at .parallax/<slug>/resolution-queue.json. Append-only by identity (an item is never deleted or its meaning rewritten); only its lifecycle moves open -> resolved|superseded, and only via scripts/resolution.py. escalations.md is a human-readable projection, NOT the source of truth. See DESIGN_v0.31_safe_completion.md §7.3 / §9.

kind.description: Only genuine contract ambiguities are resolvable; breaker/anti-cheat/safety-without-choice/code-fault/test-fault/limit are NOT items.

source_contract_hash.description: contract_hash of the generation that produced this item (binds it to a contract; a git hash-object id).

spec_refs.description: Spec section(s)/behavior the gap concerns — REQUIRED; an item with no spec reference is inadmissible.

question.description: What is undefined, as a behavioral question (never an implementation question).

options.description: Two or more admissible behavioral readings; each with its observable consequence. The human picks one, supplies their own concrete rule, rescopes, or abandons.

source_receipts.description: Stable references/hashes of the raw verdict receipts this item came from.
